welcome.description: Stoke helps couples stay connected through simple daily prompts.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: We sent you a link to reset your password.

acceptInvite.title: Join your partner
acceptInvite.subtitle: Enter the code they sent you.
acceptInvite.invalidCodeBody: This code isn't valid or has expired. Ask your partner for a new one.

firstPrompt.title: Here's how it works
firstPrompt.samplePrompt: What's one thing your partner did this week that made your day better?
firstPrompt.explanation: Each day, you both answer privately. Then you see each other's response.
firstPrompt.sampleResponse: When you made coffee before I asked. I noticed, even if I didn't say anything.

invitePartner.title: Invite your partner
invitePartner.subtitle: Stoke works best together. Send this to your partner.
invitePartner.subtitleCreate: Stoke works best together. Create an invite to send to your partner.
invitePartner.waitForThem: I'll wait for them to join

preferences.title: A few quick things
preferences.partnerLabel: What should we call your partner?
preferences.promptTimeLabel: When should your daily prompt arrive?

toneCalibration.title: How are you two doing?
toneCalibration.subtitle: This helps us start in the right place.
toneCalibration.solidDescription: Just want to stay that way
toneCalibration.okayDescription: But feel a bit distant lately

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Tap the link to verify your account.
verifyEmail.sentAlert: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.errorAlert: Could not resend. Please try again later.
verifyEmail.note: You can verify later, but some features require a verified email.

waitingPartner.title: Waiting for your partner
waitingPartner.subtitle: We'll let you know when they join.

today.promptOnWay: Your prompt is on its way
today.emptySubtitle: Your prompt is on the way

memories.title: Memories
memories.noCompletionsSubtitle: Complete a prompt together to see it here.
memories.emptySavedTitle: Your saved memories will appear here.
memories.emptySavedSubtitle: Each week, pick your favorite moment to save.

insights.title: Insights
insights.emptySubtitle: Complete a few prompts together and your relationship insights will appear here.
insights.completeMore: Complete more prompts to see your emotional journey.
insights.earnMilestones: Complete prompts together to earn milestones.

settings.title: Settings
settings.promptTimeSubtitle: When should your daily prompt arrive?
settings.frequencySubtitle: How often should you receive prompts?
settings.deleteBody:
Your account will be deactivated immediately and your data permanently removed after 30 days. Your partner will be notified.

This cannot be undone.
settings.anonymizeBody:
This will replace all your written responses with [removed]. Your partner's responses will not be affected.

This cannot be undone.
settings.exportUnavailable: Data export is available once every 24 hours.
settings.exportFailed: Failed to export data. Please try again.
settings.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.anonymizeFailed: Failed to anonymize responses. Please try again.
settings.safetyText: Stoke is not therapy or crisis support. If you feel unsafe in your relationship, please seek help.

profile.linkWithPartner: Link with a partner to edit
profile.loveLanguageSubtitle: How do you most feel loved?
profile.couldNotUpload: Could not upload photo. Please try again.

goals.title: Goals
goals.setGoalSubtitle: Set a goal for your relationship
goals.failedToCreate: Failed to create goal. Please try again.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.addDescription: Add experiences, trips, and dreams you want to share with each other
wishlist.somethingYoudLove: Something you'd love to do together
wishlist.failedToAdd: Failed to add item. Please try again.
wishlist.emptySubtitle: Add things you'd love to do as a couple

paywall.title: Stoke Premium
paywall.subtitle: Deepen your connection with premium features.

features.prompts: Adaptive prompts that grow with you

resources.title: Resources
resources.intro: Stoke is not therapy. These resources can help if you want to go deeper.
resources.safetyFooter: If you feel unsafe in your relationship, please reach out for help. You are not alone.

chat.deleteConfirm: This message will be removed for both of you.

offline.banner: You're offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.
